title: Bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.5.0 to 1.7.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/onsi/gomega](https://github.com/onsi/gomega) from 1.5.0 to 1.7.0.
Release notes *Sourced from [github.com/onsi/gomega's releases](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/releases).* > ## v1.7.0 > ### Features > - export format property variables ([#347](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/347)) [642e5ba] > > ### Fixes > - minor fix in the documentation of ExpectWithOffset ([#358](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/358)) [beea727] > > ## v1.6.0 > ### Features > > - Display special chars on error [41e1b26] > - Add BeElementOf matcher [6a48b48] > > ### Fixes > > - Remove duplication in XML matcher tests [cc1a6cb] > - Remove unnecessary conversions ([#357](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/357)) [7bf756a] > - Fixed import order ([#353](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/353)) [2e3b965] > - Added missing error handling in test ([#355](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/355)) [c98d3eb] > - Simplify code ([#356](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/356)) [0001ed9] > - Simplify code ([#354](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/354)) [0d9100e] > - Fixed typos ([#352](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/352)) [3f647c4] > - Add failure message tests to BeElementOf matcher [efe19c3] > - Update go-testcov untested sections [37ee382] > - Mark all uncovered files so go-testcov ./... works [53b150e] > - Reenable gotip in travis [5c249dc] > - Fix the typo of comment ([#345](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/345)) [f0e010e] > - Optimize contain_element_matcher [abeb93d]
Changelog *Sourced from [github.com/onsi/gomega's changelog](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md).* > ## 1.7.0 > > ### Features > - export format property variables ([#347](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/347)) [642e5ba] > > ### Fixes > - minor fix in the documentation of ExpectWithOffset ([#358](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/358)) [beea727] > > ## 1.6.0 > > ### Features > > - Display special chars on error [41e1b26] > - Add BeElementOf matcher [6a48b48] > > ### Fixes > > - Remove duplication in XML matcher tests [cc1a6cb] > - Remove unnecessary conversions ([#357](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/357)) [7bf756a] > - Fixed import order ([#353](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/353)) [2e3b965] > - Added missing error handling in test ([#355](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/355)) [c98d3eb] > - Simplify code ([#356](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/356)) [0001ed9] > - Simplify code ([#354](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/354)) [0d9100e] > - Fixed typos ([#352](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/352)) [3f647c4] > - Add failure message tests to BeElementOf matcher [efe19c3] > - Update go-testcov untested sections [37ee382] > - Mark all uncovered files so go-testcov ./... works [53b150e] > - Reenable gotip in travis [5c249dc] > - Fix the typo of comment ([#345](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/345)) [f0e010e] > - Optimize contain_element_matcher [abeb93d]
Commits - [`bdebf9e`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/bdebf9e0ece900259084cfa4121b97ce1a540939) v1.7.0 - [`642e5ba`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/642e5bab05fdb01ca4a94d18b2af29b219cb21cf) export format property variables ([#347](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/347)) - [`beea727`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/beea7276191eede26d9cd14df7ab50f0a5c9f25f) minor fix in the documentation of ExpectWithOffset ([#358](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/358)) - [`27d50ea`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/27d50ea6455b212cf516609fa58b2b5dce1abc81) v1.6.0 - [`cc1a6cb`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/cc1a6cbb7b7d07c264ebb5e3a89a5f693847c213) Remove duplication in XML matcher tests - [`7bf756a`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/7bf756a46ed75eb0beb3cd95f7b177ee8ac01041) Remove unnecessary conversions ([#357](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/357)) - [`2e3b965`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/2e3b965217103f3054061bd78cb31bca3e94a0da) Fixed import order ([#353](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/353)) - [`c98d3eb`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/c98d3eb97268cc0327657558e4cd31bf517e837a) Added missing error handling in test ([#355](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/355)) - [`0001ed9`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/0001ed9df8e1f6dccd9f7f31c51e2aafc087a84a) Simplify code ([#356](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/356)) - [`0d9100e`](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/commit/0d9100e1abc14e22dac8a528f6efe5d02c1abadb) Simplify code ([#354](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/gomega/issues/354)) - Additional commits viewable in [compare view](https://github.com/onsi/gomega/compare/v1.5.0...v1.7.0)

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/onsi/gomega&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.5.0&new-version=1.7.0)](https://dependabot.com/compatibility-score.html?dependency-name=github.com/onsi/gomega&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.5.0&new-version=1.7.0) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) --- **Note:** This repo was added to Dependabot recently, so you'll receive a maximum of 5 PRs for your first few update runs. Once an update run creates fewer than 5 PRs we'll remove that limit. You can always request more updates by clicking `Bump now` in your [Dependabot dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com).
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot use these labels` will set the current labels as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these reviewers` will set the current reviewers as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these assignees` will set the current assignees as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use this milestone` will set the current milestone as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot badge me` will comment on this PR with code to add a "Dependabot enabled" badge to your readme Additionally, you can set the following in your Dependabot [dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com): - Update frequency (including time of day and day of week) - Pull request limits (per update run and/or open at any time) - Out-of-range updates (receive only lockfile updates, if desired) - Security updates (receive only security updates, if desired) Finally, you can contact us by mentioning @dependabot.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

:pushpin: Commit b2780eb has been approved by `rhatdan`
